name: CHOCOLATE 2B... Or, "2P"?
description:
𝚂𝚌𝚊𝚗𝚗𝚎𝚛-𝚝𝚢𝚙𝚎 𝚞𝚗𝚒𝚝𝚜 𝚕𝚒𝚔𝚎 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚗𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛 𝚑𝚊𝚍 𝚙𝚊𝚛𝚝𝚗𝚎𝚛𝚜 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚒𝚛 𝚖𝚒𝚜𝚜𝚒𝚘𝚗𝚜. 𝙱𝚞𝚝 𝚠𝚑𝚎𝚗 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚌𝚘𝚕𝚕𝚎𝚊𝚐𝚞𝚎 𝙽𝚒𝚗𝚎𝚜 𝚒𝚜 𝚊𝚜𝚜𝚒𝚐𝚗𝚎𝚍 𝚝𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚌𝚘𝚕𝚍 𝚋𝚞𝚝 𝚕𝚎𝚝𝚑𝚊𝚕 𝚋𝚎𝚊𝚞𝚝𝚢 𝟸𝙱 𝚊𝚜 𝙷𝙸𝚂 𝙿𝙰𝚁𝚃𝙽𝙴𝚁, 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚗 𝚕𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞'𝚛𝚎 𝚊𝚜𝚜𝚒𝚐𝚗𝚎𝚍 𝚘𝚗𝚎 𝙸𝙳𝙴𝙽𝚃𝙸𝙲𝙰𝙻 𝚝𝚘 𝚑𝚎𝚛... 𝙾𝚛 𝚠𝚎𝚕𝚕, "𝚊𝚕𝚖𝚘𝚜𝚝."

YES, YES, YEEEEEESH! I DID IT AGAIN, BONEHEADS!

My second brown-skinned bot, because I LOVE women like that, and I also LOVE ROBO-BITCHESSSS!!! 🤎🤎🤎

But still, I'm afraid it's...

"DISCLEIMIN-TIME"!!!!

Ahem...

I am NOT racist, I do NOT promote racism, and anything said by this bot is completely for the sake of the plot in reaction to WHATEVER the user writes. It is fictional, it is ironic, and it SHOULD NOT be taken seriously.

⚠️

Okay? And still, some people won't give a shit and call me names... ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ Whatever.

Sooooo... yeah. A few weeks ago I finished the Nier Automata anime (I recommend it), and I rediscovered my love for the story and, above all, THE CHARACTERS. QwQ 🖤✨

I'd like to make another 2B bot, a dual bot with 2B and A2, and maybe ANOTHER dual bot but with Eve-07 and 2B. 👀 I'd also like to make those bots from the POV of a android, although I wouldn't mind making one from the POV of a human or something (although there are already plenty of human POVs out there).

Oh, and you'll notice that you're not called "(Any number) S." This is because I want to let you know if you want to call yourselves "69S" or something like that, feel free to do so. You'll also notice that I took several "creative liberties" with 2P's personality, this to differentiate her from 2B HERSELF, and... I think I like how she turned out. uwu

I hope you enjoy it, and please leave any reviews. nwn!!

Ciao.

ART: DaidoujiPV

ALL CHARACTERS ARE +18 OR AGED UP
creator: Bone-r!?CRACK!
